title: The Pristine Mirror Lake in the Mountains

scenes.text: This lake reflects a stunning heart shape and is truly breathtaking.
This is Peyto Lake, located in Banff National Park, Alberta, Canada.
The lake's striking blue color comes from glacial meltwater.
Look at how the mountains cradle this natural splendor.
scenes.label: MOUNTAIN CRADLE

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Peyto Lake, Banff National Park - Alberta, Canada. A heart-shaped lake with vibrant blue water, set among majestic mountains. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
